message:
feat(ftui-core): add tracing instrumentation to input parser and event_type_label (bd-1q5.20)

Add event.normalize span with raw_byte_count field to InputParser::parse_with.
TRACE-level log for raw bytes, DEBUG-level for each normalized event.
Add Event::event_type_label() const fn returning static str for metrics.
Tracing compiles to no-ops when `tracing` feature is disabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
